name: HTTP Request
description: Makes an HTTP request. Use for calling external APIs, Slack webhooks, etc.

body.description: Request body. If an object, serialized as JSON with a JSON content-type unless headers override.

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: Optional body override. If provided, replaces config.body.

outputs.name: body
outputs.description: Response body. Parsed as JSON if content-type is JSON-ish, otherwise raw string.
